title: 2.  Linggu and Dabai are located on the lateral side of the second metacarpal bo
text:
perspective of holographic theory, Linggu corresponds to lower jiao and lumbar and legs in the
upright direction of the second metacarpal bone to the whole body; Dabai corresponds to lower
jiao and lumbar and leg in the reversed direction.  Both points can treat lumbar and legs
(including sciatica).  When they are used together to treat lower jiao, lumbar and leg, the
effectiveness is certainly strong.
